concept: Formulate a game where players control a sandcastle constantly eroding from the incoming tide, requiring strategic reinforcement of walls and moats to survive. The player must collect shells and seaweed to strengthen their fortress against increasingly powerful waves. Beach crabs can either help or hinder your construction efforts depending on how you treat them. As day turns to night, phosphorescent algae illuminate potential weak spots in your sandy stronghold. Victory comes when your castle withstands the final midnight high tide while neighboring AI castles collapse.
